response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source leadership, and exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, but lacks demonstrable production-scale multi-agent AI systems in fintech, regulatory compliance experience, and evidence of scaling engineering teams beyond 10–15 people — critical for this CTO role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven track record in event-driven, distributed systems (e.g., GISCollective, DLang microservices)
Strong engineering culture contributions via testing, CI/CD, and knowledge sharing
concerns: No clear evidence of building or operating multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech environments
Lacks demonstrated experience scaling engineering teams to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
Minimal mention of real-time credit risk, working capital, or financial compliance infrastructure
